title: Generated C++ array index out of bound

features.name: unpacked array of packed struct with non-zero lower bound
features.description: Code should include a packed struct typedef used in an unpacked array with non-zero lower bound index
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic config_a; logic config_b; } param_t; param_t conf [1:2];

features.name: array struct member in sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include a struct member accessed through an array element used in a posedge sensitivity list
